rationale: The citation plays an active role beyond background listing. The citing paper uses Paharia, Avery, and Keinan (2014) as prior evidence on size-related judgments and, importantly, as an alternative underdog explanation to control for in its experimental design. In Study 2 and related discussion, the authors explicitly state they included information to avoid portraying the smaller firm as an underdog, citing this paper. They also return to it in the general discussion when arguing their effects are distinct from underdog-based accounts.
relation_description: The citing paper substantively positions itself against the underdog mechanism emphasized in Paharia et al. (2014), and designs its studies to rule that mechanism out while testing a different lay-theory account of company-size inferences. It uses the cited work as a key comparative benchmark and alternative explanation rather than as a mere passing reference.
